articles.author: Leslie Josephs
articles.title: JetBlue bets big on Fort Lauderdale, from a new airport lounge to an international gateway - CNBC
articles.description: JetBlue faces heavy competition from Miami International Airport, an American Airlines stronghold.
articles.content:
JetBlue Airways is already the biggest airline in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, and it wants to get even bigger.
"Lauderdale has been a star for us," JetBlue President Marty St. George said this month a… [+3650 chars]
